title: rubus × assurgens var. uncinellus
intro: Rubus × assurgens var. uncinellus is a hybrid blackberry species, specifically a variety of the Rubus assurgens plant, commonly found in mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus × assurgens var. uncinellus lie in its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant offers various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, alleviating gastrointestinal issues, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to treat various health conditions.
